definitions.text: An organ through which animals see (“perceive surroundings via light”).
examples: Bright lights really hurt my eyes.
The car was quite pleasing to the eye, but impractical.

definitions.text: To carefully or appraisingly observe (someone or something).
examples: After eyeing the document for half an hour, she decided not to sign it.
They went out and eyed the new car one last time before deciding.

definitions.text: To remove the reproductive buds from (potatoes).
The name of the Latin script letter I/i.
